summary: First-finish smoke test for Beautymanntra salon site. Backend: all 8 endpoints pass (root, services, slots GET/validation, bookings create/duplicate-409/invalid-time-400, slots reflects booked, newsletter idempotent). Frontend: home loads, hero rating shows '4.6 · 1,012 Google reviews', navbar Book Now visible, booking dialog opens from hero CTA, 10 time slots render, full booking submission reaches data-testid='booking-success', service card -> service dialog -> book this service preselect flow works, newsletter form submits, testimonials prev/next clickable, FAQ accordion opens. No console errors observed. Hero headline text locator returned false only due to italic span split (rendered correctly in screenshot).
passed: POST /api/bookings valid -> 200 with id, status=confirmed, created_at
GET /api/slots after booking shows booked time and removed from available
Home page loads, hero rating visible (4.6 · 1,012)
hero-book-btn opens booking-dialog with 14-day date carousel and 10 slot grid
service-card-hair opens service dialog; service-dialog-book opens booking-dialog (service preselected to Hair)
